subcodes.first_line: Your letters were perused, and the intense lamentations embedded and interwoven within the words were noted [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
